hero.badge: Upload a file · AI translates · Download instantly
hero.description: Upload any file. Pick your target languages. Our AI translates it in minutes and delivers the result in your original file format — ready to ship.

mockPreview.caption: Translation Studio — real-time progress per language, download when done

howItWorks.heading: Three steps. Done in minutes.
howItWorks.step1Body: Drop a JSON, CSV, Markdown, PDF, or XLIFF file. We pull out every sentence automatically — no copy-pasting, no setup.
howItWorks.step2Body: Pick your AI model — Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, or DeepSeek. See the exact price before anything runs. Most files finish in under a few minutes.
howItWorks.step3Body: Your translated files are delivered in the same format you uploaded — JSON, CSV, Markdown, XLIFF, PDF, and more. No reformatting needed.

features.heading: Everything you need to go global
features.multiModelBody: Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, DeepSeek. Pick the one that fits your budget and quality bar.
features.costTransparency: See the price before you pay
features.costTransparencyBody: We show an itemised cost per language before anything runs. No surprise bills at month end.
features.pdfSupportBody: Image-based PDFs are read by AI vision automatically. No manual text extraction needed.
features.auditTrailBody: JSON, CSV, Markdown, XLIFF, PDF, .strings, .po, Android XML, .arb, .properties and more.
features.languagesBody: From Spanish and French to Japanese and Arabic. Pick by region, market preset, or search by name.
features.accessControl: Same format in, same format out
features.accessControlBody: Upload a JSON file, download a translated JSON file. No reformatting or copy-pasting required.

pricing.heading: Only pay for what you use
pricing.subheading: No monthly fee. No seat limit. Your card is charged after translation completes.
pricing.includedHeading: Every plan includes everything — no add-ons
pricing.included2: All AI models (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, DeepSeek)
pricing.included6: Download in your original file format
pricing.included7: Role-based access for your whole team

estimator.title: Estimate your cost
estimator.subtitle: Get a ballpark before you sign up — no credit card needed
estimator.disclaimer: Rough estimate. Final cost depends on actual word count and model output length.

cta.heading: Ready to translate your first file?
cta.body: Sign up in 30 seconds. Upload a file, pick a language, and see your translation in minutes.

login.subtitle: Sign in to your account
login.contact: New Google users are created automatically.
login.error: Wrong email or password — please try again
login.signupSignInFailed: Account created but sign-in failed. Try signing in.

vision.badge: Five ideas that make translation actually work
vision.description: Most tools add AI on top of an old workflow. We started from what AI makes possible and built the workflow around that. Here is what changed.
vision.ctaHeading: Want to see it in action?
vision.ctaBody: Start with a free translation today — no setup, no credit card. See the full workflow for yourself.
vision.p1Point1: Knows whether a string is a button label, a legal notice, or a marketing headline — and translates accordingly
vision.p1Point2: Reads surrounding strings, file structure, and metadata to get the full picture
vision.p1Point3: Gets smarter with every project — not a static dictionary
vision.p1To: "What does this mean in this context?"
vision.p2Point1: Detects your content type automatically — app strings, documents, marketing, legal
vision.p2Point2: Picks the right quality settings for each file without you configuring anything
vision.p2Point3: Works with your existing tools — GitHub, Figma, Contentful — no pipeline to manage
vision.p3Point1: Learns your tone, voice, and terminology from translations you have already approved
vision.p3Point2: Scores quality against your own standards — not a generic rubric
vision.p3Point3: Catches cultural mistakes, not just grammar errors
vision.p3Point4: Tells you why something was flagged — not just that it was
vision.p3To: "Does it sound like us in that market?"
vision.p4Point1: Flags only the sentences that actually need a human eye — not all 10,000 of them
vision.p4Point2: Sends ambiguous or high-stakes content to a linguist automatically
vision.p4Point3: Gives reviewers alternatives and reasoning — not a blank box to type in
vision.p4Point4: Every correction feeds back into the next job
vision.p4To: "Humans review what matters. AI explains why."
vision.p5Subtitle: No new portal to log into
vision.p5Point1: Upload via the web, the API, or a GitHub PR — whichever fits your team
vision.p5Point2: Native support for GitHub Actions, Figma, Contentful, and CI/CD pipelines
vision.p5Point3: Download in the same format you uploaded — JSON, CSV, Markdown, XLIFF
vision.p5Point4: Full API access for teams who want to automate everything
vision.p5To: "Translation happens where your work already is."
